name: Super Spam Cheeseball
recipeIngredient: 1 can SPAM Luncheon Meat, shredded (12 oz)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the shredded SPAM, shredded cheddar cheese, softened cream cheese, finely diced onion, horseradish, Worcestershire sauce, dry mustard, and chili powder.
2. Mix well until all ingredients are evenly incorporated.
3. Form the mixture into a ball.
4. Roll the ball in chopped nuts until coated.
5. Cover the formed cheeseball with plastic wrap and refrigerate for several hours or overnight to allow flavors to meld.
6. About 30 minutes before serving, remove the cheeseball from the refrigerator.
7. Serve with crackers.
